findings.description: s3 (nablarch-archetype-parent overview) and s4 (各構成要素の詳細 table) appear in reversed order relative to the source. In the source, the project-name→archetype mapping table is at the top of the h2 section '各構成要素の詳細', and nablarch-archetype-parent is a subsection (h3) that follows it. The knowledge file places s3 (archetype-parent overview) before s4 (the mapping table), which is the reverse of the source document order.
findings.source_evidence: Source order: h2 '各構成要素の詳細' with table first → then h3 'nablarch-archetype-parent(親プロジェクト)' → h4 '概要'. Knowledge file index order: s3 (archetype-parent overview) → s4 (各構成要素の詳細 table).

findings.description: The source explicitly documents that WEB-INF contains web.xml ('web.xmlが格納されている'), but the knowledge file's directory tree for pj-web shows WEB-INF with only errorPages/ and test/ subdirectories, omitting the web.xml file entry and its description.
findings.source_evidence: Source: '\---WEB-INF … web.xmlが格納されている。'. Knowledge file s6 directory tree shows WEB-INF/ with errorPages/ and test/ but no mention of web.xml.

findings.description: web.xml is explicitly named in the source as a file stored in WEB-INF within the pj-web project structure, but 'web.xml' is absent from s6's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: '\---WEB-INF … web.xmlが格納されている。'. s6 hints contain 'WEB-INF' but not 'web.xml'.
